title: athanasia rugulosa
intro: Athanasia rugulosa, also known as the Everlasting or King's Cudweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. This plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Athanasia rugulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
